name: Wondrous Figurine (Marble Elephant)
description:
Finely carved from a solid piece of marble, this gleaming elephant statuette becomes a fully grown when activated.

The elephant can be called upon no more than four times per month. It remains for 24 hours as long as it is being used as a beast of burden or for transport.

If it attempts an attack or otherwise engages in combat, it reverts to statuette form after [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.
